description:
Update an existing Meeting Topic.

#### Uploading attachments
To upload attachments you must upload the entire payload as `multipart/form-data` content-type and
specify each parameter as form-data together with `attachments[]` as files.

meeting_id.description: The ID of the Meeting the Meeting Topic belongs to

title.description: The Title of the Meeting Topic

description.description: The Description of the Meeting Topic

due_date.description: The Due Date of the Meeting Topic

status.description: The Status of the Meeting Topic

minutes.description: Please look at Item 1 and have those pieces completed before

is_private.description: The Private status of the Meeting Topic

closed_at.description: The Date of the Meeting Topic being closed

priority.description: The Priority of the Meeting Topic

added_under_agenda.description: The Added Under Agenda status of the Meeting Topic

meeting_wide_number.description: The Meeting Wide Number of the Meeting Topic

meeting_category_id.description: The ID of the Meeting Category the Meeting Topic belongs to

assignment_ids.description:
An array of the IDs of the Assignments of the Meeting Topic.

Setting `meeting_topic[assignment_ids]` to "none" erases assignments.

upload_ids.description: The specified array of upload_ids gets associated as attachments to the meeting topic.

attachments.description:
An array of the Attachments of the Meeting Topic.
